MAIN_INSIGHT: The Boathouse has a solid listing — good title, decent description, and respectable photos. But at 28% occupancy over the last 90 days, the bookings aren't reflecting the listing quality. This is a distribution, pricing, or visibility problem — not a content problem.
QUICK_WIN: Lower your nightly rate by £15 for the next 30 days to generate booking momentum. Airbnb's algorithm rewards booking velocity — early traction lifts your ranking and brings organic views.
FREE_TIP: Turn on Instant Book if it's currently disabled. Listings with Instant Book get a meaningful algorithmic boost and convert better — guests searching for lake district properties often filter by it.
PLATFORM_2_DESC: Different audience — families, longer stays, fewer competitors. Same property, new market.
PLATFORM_2_BENCH: £6k–10k additional per year for well-listed properties
PLATFORM_3_DESC: Massive international reach. Fills gaps between Airbnb bookings, strong for shoulder seasons.
BRANDON_NOTE_LINE_1: The Boathouse has good bones — the listing isn't the problem.
BRANDON_NOTE_LINE_2: At 28% occupancy in Windermere, something is suppressing visibility or conversion — not content.
BRANDON_NOTE_LINE_3: The full report identifies which lever to pull first: pricing, rank, or channels.
